headlines.title: Maine’s Graham Platner meets with Democratic senators amid controversy
headlines.description: Graham Platner visited Washington on Tuesday to meet with Democrats amid fresh controversy.

headlines.title: George Santos reported to federal prosecutors on suspicion of insider trading
headlines.description: Betting activity by disgraced former Rep. George Santos on the prediction market Kalshi has been reported to the Department of Justice, according to a source familiar with the matter. NBC News' Melanie Zanona reports from Capitol Hill on the investigation and the former congressman's initial response.

headlines.title: Trump Faces Pushback for Tapping Housing Official as Intel Chief
headlines.description: President Donald Trump is facing bipartisan backlash after elevating a fierce loyalist to the country’s top intelligence position, replacing Tulsi Gabbard. Bill Pulte, the head of the Federal Housing Finance Agency will now also serve as acting Director of National Intelligence, overseeing the country’s spy agencies including the CIA. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Ukraine Hits St. Petersburg With Massive Wave of Drones
headlines.description: A wave of Ukrainian drones targeted sites in St. Petersburg where Russian President Vladimir Putin is kicking off a closely-watched international summit. It comes after Ukraine suffered one of the worst onslaughts of the war. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Massive leadership vacuum weakens U.S. diplomacy in the face of global crises
headlines.description: Hundreds of diplomats have been forced to retire or were laid off in the Trump administration

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: GOP businessman Toby Doeden advances to runoff in South Dakota governor’s race
headlines.description: South Dakota Gov. Larry Rhoden will face businessman Toby Doeden in a GOP primary runoff as he seeks a full term in office, NBC News projects.

headlines.title: George Santos betting activity on Kalshi flagged to DOJ, sources say
headlines.description: Betting activity by disgraced former Rep.

headlines.title: Voters select candidates in key House districts that could decide the majority
headlines.description: The ballots are set in two Republican-held battleground House races in Iowa, part of a slate of primaries Tuesday shaping the battle for control of Congress in the fall

headlines.title: Where the redistricting fight stands heading into the midterms
headlines.description: After 10 states enacted new congressional maps, Republicans are in position to gain up to 16 seats this fall, compared to six for the Democrats, as the parties vie for control of the House.

headlines.title: GOP Rep. Andy Ogles deletes homophobic social media post, blames staffer
headlines.description: Rep. Andy Ogles, R-Tenn., deleted a homophobic comment he posted from his official congressional X account on Tuesday and blamed a staffer for posting it following backlash from both Democrats and Republicans

headlines.title: California’s race for governor and other key primaries remain undecided
headlines.description: California’s crowded, protracted gubernatorial primary is going to take a little more time to settle
